title: Projects
text:
# Serving Runtime Performance (Kernel + Scheduling)
Perf baseline & representative workload suite: Establish Q1 2026 latency/throughput baselines across top models and traffic shapes.
Mixed-workload scheduler prototype: Implement and test a short/long prompt scheduling policy to reduce p95 tail latency.
Kernel auto-selection v2 implementation: Ship improved kernel selection logic keyed on model family, seq length, and GPU type.
KV cache compaction improvements: Add compaction/eviction strategy to reduce memory fragmentation and burst tail latencies.
FP8/INT8 kernel benchmarking sprint: Benchmark quantization-friendly kernels on the top hosted models and GPUs.
Multi-GPU (TP) stability fixes: Fix known runtime hangs/timeouts in tensor-parallel execution under load.
Perf regression canary in prod: Deploy a small perf canary that alerts on p95 latency/tokens/sec regressions per model.
Hardware tuning profiles pack: Create tuned configs for H100/B200/L40S (or current fleet) and document expected behavior.
Runtime LTS branch & release process: Stand up an enterprise LTS channel with slower-change release notes and backport policy.

# Cost Optimization Automation (Batching, Caching, Quantization Profiles)
Internal unit economics dashboard: Build a dashboard for blended $/1M output tokens with drilldowns by model/region/customer tier.
Standard cost model spec + API: Define the cost model inputs/outputs and expose it to Console/Optimize services.
Optimization suggestions Console UX (beta): Add a “suggestions” view for batching/caching with estimated savings and risk level.
Safe apply + rollback mechanism: Implement config versioning plus one-click rollback for optimization changes.
Workload-aware batching defaults: Ship recommended batching profiles for common latency SLO tiers (fast/standard/cost-efficient).
Cache hit-rate instrumentation sprint: Improve prefix/KV cache telemetry and generate actionable “increase hit-rate” recommendations.
Quantization profile library (opt-in): Publish per-model quantization profiles with route-level enablement controls.
Quality guardrails gating for optimize: Require eval checks and regression thresholds before applying cost-saving config changes.

# Reliability Program (SLOs, Incident Reduction, Graceful Degradation)
Tiered SLO definitions + error budget policy: Define availability/latency/error SLOs per Hosted/Dedicated tier and enforce error budgets.
Incident taxonomy + ownership mapping: Classify top incident types and assign primary owners and remediation SLAs.
Regional failover automation upgrade: Improve region failover triggers and validate with controlled failover tests.
Hosted circuit breakers + load shedding: Add overload protection with clear customer-facing errors and safe degradation modes.
Hot-route capacity protection: Add rate-limit/quotas/priority routing for top enterprise routes to prevent fleet-wide impact.
Status page transparency upgrades: Improve component granularity, incident comms templates, and post-incident summaries.
Incident bot + diagnostics improvements: Enhance automated context gathering (recent deploys, config diffs, saturation signals).

# Unified Rollouts, A/B Testing, and Model Lifecycle
Model metadata schema + changelog generator: Standardize model/version metadata and auto-generate customer-visible release notes.
Hosted canary rollout workflow (GA): Ship canary UI + policy controls for percentage-based rollouts on Hosted routes.
Auto-rollback on SLO breach integration: Wire rollout controller to latency/error SLO monitors with configurable rollback thresholds.
Shadow traffic tool for eval metrics: Enable shadow testing and capture quality metrics without impacting user responses.
Route-level A/B testing framework: Support A/B splits with measurement hooks (latency, cost, eval scores) in Console.
Dedicated staged rollouts for reserved pools: Implement phased rollout controls for Dedicated capacity pools with per-stage gates.

# Enterprise Security & Compliance Foundation
RBAC v2 design + permission inventory: Inventory sensitive actions and implement fine-grained roles and permission checks.
Audit log schema standardization + coverage: Standardize event schema and ensure 100% coverage for sensitive actions.
SIEM-ready audit export (beta): Deliver export integration (e.g., Splunk/Datadog/S3) with filtering and delivery guarantees.
KMS integration hardening + rotation docs: Improve key handling, rotation procedures, and failure-mode testing.
Hosted data residency enforcement: Add region pinning with enforcement checks and clear error messaging for violations.
Retention controls + compliance reporting pack: Implement retention configuration and produce a baseline compliance report package.

# Private Deployment Automation (VPC + On-Prem Packaging)
VPC Terraform modules (alpha): Publish reference Terraform modules for standard VPC deployments with validated defaults.
Private observability minimum pack: Deliver baseline dashboards/alerts/log pipelines required for “supported” Private installs.
Private upgrade + rollback mechanism: Implement reliable upgrade workflow with prechecks, backups, and rollback hooks.
On-prem offline artifact signing: Add signed offline bundles and verification steps for air-gapped installs.
Day-2 ops toolkit (backup/restore): Provide documented scripts and runbooks for backup/restore and disaster recovery.

# Dedicated Capacity & Fleet Management
Dedicated throughput SLO + tier definitions: Define throughput guarantees and map to hardware shapes and pricing tiers.
Burst capacity option implementation: Add controlled burst pools with guardrails to protect neighbor workloads.
Autoscaling policies with customer bounds: Implement autoscaling with min/max bounds and predictive signals.
Provision-to-ready automation sprint: Reduce time-to-ready via automated provisioning, images, and validated configs.

# Developer Experience (SDKs, Quickstarts, Usage Analytics)
SDK parity audit + auth/retry standardization: Align Python/TS/Go SDK behavior for auth, retries, timeouts, and streaming.
Streaming + tool-calling examples refresh: Update examples across SDKs and docs for streaming/function calling/structured output.
Quickstart templates: RAG + agents: Ship production-minded templates with observability hooks and safe defaults.
In-console usage insights: cost drivers by route: Add route/model breakdowns and top cost drivers with exportable reports.
Guided onboarding + “first production launch” checklist: Create an in-product checklist and docs to reduce time-to-first-success.

# Go-to-Market (Growth, Sales, Partnerships)
Benchmark report + launch campaign: Publish a benchmark report (latency/$) by model+region and run a coordinated launch.
Cloud marketplace listing refresh: Update AWS/GCP marketplace listings with new SKUs, security docs, and onboarding flow.
Enterprise security enablement kit update: Refresh security FAQ, compliance one-pagers, and standard RFP responses.
PLG-to-sales signal routing + playbook: Implement usage thresholds and intent signals routed to sales with a follow-up cadence.
Sales demo environment + scripted talk track: Stand up a reliable demo tenant with “known-good” scenarios and a repeatable deck.
Case study + customer reference program: Recruit 3–5 design partners for public case studies and reference calls.
Vertical ABM pilot (regulated workloads): Run a 6–8 week ABM pilot for 1–2 verticals (finserv/health) with targeted assets.
Lifecycle growth experiments sprint: Test onboarding emails, in-console nudges, and retargeting to lift activation and retention.

# Customer Success & Support
Escalation playbook + known-issues sprint: Refresh escalation paths, SLAs, and publish top workarounds into the knowledge base.

# Finance / Legal / RevOps
Pricing/packaging experiment analysis + meter sanity checks: Validate billing meters, analyze pricing experiments, and publish guidance.
